title: Feel The Gap: Find Your Next Global Market
hook: You have a product. But WHERE should you sell it?

scenes.visual: Entrepreneur looking thoughtful, then confused, then a huge question mark appears over their head. Fast-paced, attention-grabbing zoom.
scenes.text_overlay: You have a product. But WHERE should you sell it?
scenes.voiceover: You have an amazing product. But WHERE should you sell it to truly explode globally?

scenes.visual: Rapid cuts: spinning globe with question marks, stacks of complex market research reports, stressed entrepreneur pinching their nose, then a visual of competitors' success metrics.
scenes.text_overlay: Endless research? Wasted time? Missing opportunities?
scenes.voiceover: Are you drowning in endless market research? Wasting precious time and missing massive global opportunities? It's frustrating, right? Stop guessing where to go next.

scenes.visual: Seamless transition to a dynamic screen recording of the Feel The Gap platform. User types product, hits enter, and vibrant data visualizations pop up, highlighting top countries with high market demand. Zoom in on a key graph showing growth potential.
scenes.text_overlay: Feel The Gap: Your global market compass.
scenes.voiceover: Imagine instantly knowing your next big market. Feel The Gap uses advanced AI to pinpoint exact countries demanding your product.

scenes.visual: Entrepreneur smiling confidently, pointing to a graph showing increased sales. A bold text overlay with a powerful testimonial/stat appears.
scenes.text_overlay: "10x market reach in weeks!" - Sarah K., CEO.
scenes.voiceover: Entrepreneurs like Sarah are boosting their market reach by 10x in weeks, not years! Real businesses, real results.

scenes.visual: Clean, bold display of "feelthegap.com" with an animating "Free to Start" button. Finger taps the screen.
scenes.voiceover: Stop guessing. Start growing. Visit feelthegap.com – it’s free to start!
